purpose: DebugTunnel end-to-end generation canaries that verify installed mini-apps use Web Mini-App Lego components.

cases.goal: Build a compact polished Wordle clone called Word Quest using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It must behave like Wordle: one hidden five-letter answer, six guesses, a 5x6 letter grid, green/yellow/gray feedback tiles, on-screen QWERTY keyboard with key coloring, Enter/Delete/New Word controls, dictionary validation, score, streak, persistent best score, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Keep it simple and reliable. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.word-logic.

Build a compact polished Mastermind clone code-breaker web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have clickable color/code guesses, feedback pegs for exact and color-only matches, turn tracking, score, persistent best score, keyboard or click controls, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.mastermind.

Build a compact polished Minesweeper clone called Minesweeper 99 using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have mine placement, reveal logic, flood reveal, right-click/long-press flagging, timer, score, persistent best score, touch-friendly controls, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.minesweeper.

Build a compact polished Pong clone web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have two paddles, ball physics, score to 7, persistent best score, keyboard/touch controls, sound effects, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.pong.

Build a compact polished Defender clone web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have a side-scrolling ship, alien abductors, humans/rescue targets, radar/minimap, bullets, lives, waves, score, persistent best score, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.defender.

Build a compact polished NYT Mini Crossword clone using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have a small crossword grid, black cells, numbered starts, across/down clue lists, selected word highlighting, keyboard entry, timer, persistent best time, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.crossword.

Build a compact polished Atari Adventure clone using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have room-to-room movement, keys, locked gates, dragons, treasure, inventory, score or timer, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.adventure-maze.
